title: VH_defalt
description: This is a PvP and survival resource pack I make to pass the time (still in alpha!)
body:
# What does this resource pack add?

At the time this description was written, this resource pack added small, useful things, for example:
- wool
- some armor
- various items
- bare bones-type minerals with edges (soon to be shiny)


That's it for now :D, check out the gallery to see the resources in more detail!

Credits for Description: [@Uanderson_Test3](https://modrinth.com/user/Uanderson_test3)
